hero.title: Hi, I'm
hero.subtitle: Fullstack Developer crafting fast, safe, and delightful web experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Fullstack Developer with experience building applications using Java, Spring, React vite and JavaScript. I focus on creating scalable solutions, writing clean code, and following best development practices. On the backend, I work with Java and Spring Boot, developing REST APIs and well-structured applications with an emphasis on performance and solid architecture. On the frontend, I use JavaScript to build dynamic and functional user interfaces.

items.title: Personal Portfolio
items.description: A responsive personal portfolio built with React that highlights projects, skills, and contact details with an emphasis on accessibility, clean design, and fast performance. Technologies: React, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, i18next, Git.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: I'm always excited to collaborate on interesting projects.

footer.description: Full Stack Developer focused on building modern and scalable digital experiences.
